results.A11y Fallback: Dashed/dotted lines per series; togglable data table with timestamps and values
results.Accessibility Notes: Differentiate series by line style (solid/dashed/dotted) not color alone. Add pattern overlays for colorblind users.
results.Color Guidance: Primary: #0080FF. Multiple series: distinct colors + distinct line styles. Fill: 20% opacity
results.Data Volume Threshold: <1000 pts: SVG; ≥1000 pts: Canvas + downsampling; >10000: aggregate to intervals
results.Keywords: trend, time-series, line, growth, timeline, progress
results.When NOT to Use: Fewer than 4 data points (use stat card); more than 6 series (visual noise); no time dimension exists
results.When to Use: Data has a time axis; user needs to observe rise/fall trends or rate of change over a continuous period

results.A11y Fallback: Numerical values always visible (not hover-only); color ranges labeled with threshold text
results.Accessibility Notes: All values always visible as text. Color ranges are labeled with text thresholds not color alone.
results.Color Guidance: Qualitative ranges: #FFCDD2 / #FFF9C4 / #C8E6C9 (bad/ok/good). Performance bar: #1976D2. Target: black 3px marker
results.Data Volume Threshold: Ideal for 3–10 bullet charts in a grid; scales to any count efficiently
results.Keywords: bullet, compact, kpi, dashboard, target, benchmark, range
results.When NOT to Use: Single KPI with emphasis (use gauge); data has no defined target range; fewer than 3 KPIs
results.When to Use: Dashboard with multiple KPIs side by side; space-constrained contexts where a gauge is too large

results.A11y Fallback: Numerical value + % of target shown as visible text; ARIA live region for real-time updates
results.Accessibility Notes: Always show numerical value + % of target as text beside chart. Never rely on color position alone.
results.Color Guidance: Performance: Red → Yellow → Green gradient. Target: marker line. Threshold zones clearly differentiated
results.Data Volume Threshold: Single metric per gauge; for 3+ KPIs use bullet chart grid layout
results.Keywords: performance, target, kpi, gauge, goal, threshold, progress
results.When NOT to Use: No target or benchmark exists; comparing multiple KPIs at once (use bullet chart grid)
results.When to Use: Single KPI measured against a defined target or threshold; dashboard summary context
